underlying_goal: Start frontend and backend services, fix connection issues, and request multiple feature improvements (editable WS port, skill capabilities, OpenRouter default, multimodal settings)
friction_detail: Backend started on random port instead of the hardcoded 18800 expected by frontend, causing connection failure.
brief_summary: User asked to start frontend/backend, hit a port mismatch bug which Claude debugged and fixed, then user requested 4 feature improvements which Claude was planning when session ended.
